reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, a pesar que usan su
prepotencia  por el servicio que tienen que ofrecer como representantes del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service, despite their arrogance regarding the service they are supposed to provide as representatives of the ACA.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, sólo paramos para comer, no utilizamos las cabañas, no fue Caro, diría que aceptable el precio de la comida y buena

(Translated by Google)
Good service, we only stopped for lunch, we didn't use the cabins. It wasn't expensive, I'd say the food was reasonably priced and good.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario
